summary: Predictive Danger Alerts (Phase 37) testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: input controls (lat/lng/speed/time), Predict button, alert banner (with severity badge, distance, risk score, danger zones), safe banner, info panel (Travel Mode, Lookahead, Time Period), speed-adaptive lookahead legend, map with risk levels.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/predictive-alert returns alert=true with severity, distance_to_risk, risk_score, danger_segments when danger ahead - VERIFIED
POST /api/predictive-alert returns alert=false, reason=safe_ahead when route is safe - VERIFIED
Cooldown: same zone within 5min returns alert=false, reason=cooldown_active with cooldown_remaining_s - VERIFIED
Speed-adaptive lookahead: walking(<2m/s)=250m, bike(2-6)=350m, vehicle(>6)=550m - VERIFIED
Direction filtering: only segments ahead of user are evaluated (implemented in _segments_ahead) - VERIFIED via code review
Alert severity: CRITICAL for critical zones or HIGH+multiple zones, HIGH for single high zone - VERIFIED
Danger segments array includes lat, lng, distance, risk, risk_level, zone_id - VERIFIED
POST /api/predictive-alert/with-alternative generates alternative routes when danger detected - VERIFIED
API requires authentication (401 without token) - VERIFIED

Frontend data-testids all present: predictive-alert-dashboard, pa-evaluate, pa-alert-banner, pa-safe-banner, pa-severity-badge, pa-info-panel, pa-map, pa-user-lat/lng, pa-dest-lat/lng, pa-speed, pa-time-mode - VERIFIED
Alert banner shows distance, risk score, danger zones count, individual danger segments - VERIFIED
Safe banner shows mode, lookahead, time period - VERIFIED
Prediction details panel shows travel mode, lookahead, time period, nearest danger - VERIFIED
Speed-adaptive lookahead legend renders correctly with Walking/Bike/Vehicle modes - VERIFIED
Map shows route line, user marker, danger zone markers with risk level colors - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Used existing HIGH zones for testing. Test user_ids prefixed with 'test-' to avoid cooldown interference.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Predictive Alerts fully functional. API endpoints at /api/predictive-alert and /api/predictive-alert/with-alternative. Frontend dashboard at /operator/predictive-alerts. Test coordinates: user at (12.968, 77.590) heading toward HIGH zone area. Safe area test: (13.1, 77.4). Cooldown is 5 minutes per (user_id, zone_id) - use unique user_ids for different test scenarios. route_coords format is [[lng, lat], ...] (GeoJSON format). Speed thresholds: walking<2m/s, bike 2-6m/s, vehicle>6m/s.

mocked_apis.route_projection: Route projection uses simple interpolation when no OSRM route available - MOCKED
mocked_apis.zone_cache: Zone risk data from in-memory cache with 5 min TTL - MOCKED

backend_api_tests: Alert fires when danger ahead with severity, distance, risk_score, danger_segments
Cooldown active on repeat alert (cooldown_remaining_s returned)
Danger segments contain required fields (lat, lng, distance, risk, risk_level, zone_id)
With-alternative endpoint returns prediction + alternative routes
Alert response has all required fields
Safe response has reason and message
frontend_ui_tests: Input controls present: pa-user-lat, pa-user-lng, pa-dest-lat, pa-dest-lng, pa-speed, pa-time-mode
Map element (pa-map) renders with CartoDB tiles
Speed-Adaptive Lookahead legend shows Walking/Bike/Vehicle modes
Prediction triggers alert banner (pa-alert-banner) with severity badge
Alert banner shows distance (47m), risk score (5.77), danger zones (5)
Individual danger segments listed with risk level and score
Info panel (pa-info-panel) shows Travel Mode, Lookahead, Time Period
Risk Levels legend on map (CRITICAL, HIGH, LOW, SAFE)
Safe banner (pa-safe-banner) displays when route is safe

verified_features: Severity classification: CRITICAL/HIGH/LOW based on risk level and danger count
Danger segments array with complete risk information
Alternative route generation when danger detected
Time period handling (day/night/late_night) with TOD multipliers
Frontend alert banner with visual severity indicator
Frontend safe banner with mode and lookahead info
Interactive map with user marker and danger zone markers
